problem: Intraoperative implant alignment during orthopedic surgeries is often inaccurate, leading to complications, revision surgeries, and poor patient outcomes. Surgeons rely on subjective visual assessment and fluoroscopy without precise measurement tools.
solution: AI-powered intraoperative alignment software that provides real-time visualization and measurement guidance during hip replacement and other orthopedic procedures. Acquired by Zimmer Biomet, the platform integrates with standard C-arm imaging to ensure accurate implant positioning.
